title: Treebo Hotels is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Treebo Hotels is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Treebo Hotels invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
